steps.title: Join the two clauses
steps.content: The first independent clause ends after Laffer curve. The next clause identifies the curve as a theoretical relationship and then says it was sketched on a napkin. The blank must correctly separate two independent clauses.

steps.title: Reject comma splices
steps.content: A gives no punctuation between the clauses. C creates a relative clause and then leaves the following main clause improperly joined. D uses only a comma between independent clauses. A semicolon correctly connects the two complete clauses. The answer is B.
